current_truth: No import manifest exists today.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Every importer run writes a `kolm-import-manifest-1` file or row.
risk: Imported data cannot be audited or purged as a batch.
recommended_action: Make manifest output mandatory for fixture import.

current_truth: Current observations have tenant fields and namespace drift.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest records tenant_id and canonical namespace.
risk: Purge by namespace will miss rows or delete the wrong rows.
recommended_action: Normalize namespace before writing manifest rows.

current_truth: No importer source checksum exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest records source export checksum and per-row checksums.
risk: Cannot prove what file/API page produced imported rows.
recommended_action: Compute source_checksum and row_checksum with canonical JSON.

current_truth: Privacy mode is only a research policy today.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest records mode, retention_days, purge_after, redactor, allow_raw, and identity salt ref.
risk: Rows can outlive privacy promises or lose redaction provenance.
recommended_action: Make privacy block required in schema.

current_truth: No import counts exist.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest records source, normalized, blocked, sidecar, score, eval, artifact, and write-back counts.
risk: Operators cannot spot loss or partial import.
recommended_action: Add count reconciliation tests.

current_truth: Future normalized rows need import_run linkage.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Each row records manifest_id, row_id, source_row_id, and row_checksum.
risk: Purge cannot find all rows for one import.
recommended_action: Add manifest_id to normalized rows and scores.

current_truth: Eval cases are embedded without source manifest linkage today.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest row entries list derived eval_case_ids.
risk: Cannot remove derived local eval cases or prove allowed embedding.
recommended_action: Track eval_case_ids outside artifacts.

current_truth: Label export is generated from observations without export IDs.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest tracks label_export_ids created from imported rows.
risk: Generated label files can survive purge.
recommended_action: Assign IDs to label exports and list them in manifest.

current_truth: No sidecar storage exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest row entry records raw_payload_ref and raw sidecar checksum when raw mode is used.
risk: Raw payloads can become orphan files.
recommended_action: Add sidecar registry and purge tests.

current_truth: External scores do not exist locally yet.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest tracks score IDs derived from each row.
risk: Purge can leave score evidence after trace deletion.
recommended_action: Add import_scores table/fixture and manifest linkage.

current_truth: No write-back rows exist.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest tracks writeback_ids and source target refs.
risk: Pending write-back jobs can outlive source deletion.
recommended_action: Add write-back queue rows with manifest_id.

current_truth: Store facade supports row removal in JSON mode.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Purge delete mode can remove rows by manifest_id.
risk: Delete is feasible for row tables but needs audit.
recommended_action: Use `remove` for import_rows/import_scores and record counts.

current_truth: Store facade supports SQLite row removal in transactions.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Purge must have JSON and SQLite parity.
risk: Purge works in dev but fails in production-like store.
recommended_action: Add SQLite purge tests.

current_truth: Store update supports patching rows.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Anonymize mode patches sensitive fields while preserving aggregate shell.
risk: Delete-only may be too destructive for audit; no anonymize contract exists.
recommended_action: Define anonymize patch allowlist.

current_truth: Cache exposes invalidate by version only, not delete by manifest row key.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest should list cache_keys and cache needs delete-by-key.
risk: Imported outputs can remain in disk cache after purge.
recommended_action: Add cache delete-by-key and data-root alignment.

current_truth: Cache writes to data/cache outside configured data lifecycle except serverless fallback.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Import purge cannot guarantee configured storage boundary.
risk: Sensitive data may remain outside KOLM_DATA_DIR.
recommended_action: Move/import cache under configured data root or list explicit cache paths.

current_truth: Current audit endpoint reconstructs from source tables.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Purge needs durable audit event because source rows may be removed.
risk: Deletion evidence disappears when rows are deleted.
recommended_action: Add durable purge audit event or signed manifest update.

current_truth: No purge dry-run exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Dry-run returns targets, blocked targets, and non-purgeable outputs without mutation.
risk: Operators cannot approve destructive purge safely.
recommended_action: Implement dry-run before delete/anonymize.

current_truth: No importer rows exist to delete.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Delete mode removes rows, scores, sidecars, labels, cache keys, pending writebacks, and loss reports.
risk: Partial deletion creates false compliance evidence.
recommended_action: Use manifest target list and report exact deleted counts.

current_truth: No anonymize mode exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Anonymize keeps counts/checksums but removes IO, IDs, comments, and raw refs.
risk: Teams may need audit totals without retaining content.
recommended_action: Add anonymize fixture and diff assertion.

current_truth: No destructive importer command exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Delete/anonymize requires manifest_id confirmation.
risk: Accidental purge can destroy customer data.
recommended_action: Use explicit confirm token matching manifest_id.

current_truth: No retention job exists for imported rows.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Retention scanner selects rows/manifests by purge_after.
risk: Retention policy becomes documentation only.
recommended_action: Add retention scan dry-run and apply mode.

current_truth: Artifacts may have been downloaded or published.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Purge marks artifact refs non-purgeable and never rewrites shipped artifacts.
risk: Users may expect artifact deletion that Kolm cannot enforce.
recommended_action: Keep source data out of artifacts and report artifact boundary.

current_truth: Compile jobs can reference artifacts and eval sets.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest should list jobs/artifacts generated from imported rows when applicable.
risk: Jobs may retain source-derived metadata.
recommended_action: Add compile job import_source refs before importer-to-compile path.

current_truth: Loss reports are needed for import quality.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest tracks loss_report_ref and purge deletes/anonymizes it.
risk: Loss reports can leak field paths or samples.
recommended_action: Default loss reports to no raw samples and include in purge scope.

current_truth: External systems expose deletion APIs with different timing.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Manifest records source deletion refs but local purge is independent.
risk: Users may assume source deletion cascades to Kolm.
recommended_action: Add source_deleted_at/local_purged_at fields.

current_truth: No purge idempotency contract exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Repeated purge returns already_purged status with same deleted/anonymized counts where possible.
risk: Retries can fail or double-count audit evidence.
recommended_action: Design purge as idempotent by manifest status.

current_truth: No partial purge report exists.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Purge records per-target success/failure and leaves manifest status partial_failed if needed.
risk: A failed sidecar delete can be hidden by row deletion success.
recommended_action: Write per-target result report before mutating manifest status.

current_truth: No import manifest or purge fixtures exist.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Add valid manifest, invalid manifest, dry-run, delete, anonymize, partial failure, cache, and artifact-boundary fixtures.
risk: Manifest and purge claims will be unverifiable.
recommended_action: Make purge fixtures importer launch blockers.

current_truth: Public importer docs do not exist yet but claim pressure is high.
manifest_or_purge_requirement: Docs should say preview until manifest, purge, retention, and privacy tests pass.
risk: Importer copy can outrun lifecycle controls.
recommended_action: Gate importer copy on manifest/purge test suite.
